title: Windwhisper Swift
description: Guide the nimble Windwhisper through ancient, forgotten Sky Temples. Dash past crumbling ruins and swirling dust devils, activating dormant wind conduits to restore the world's breath before the encroaching Stillness tak
tagline: Master the currents, outrun the quiet.

title: Terra Resonance
description: Delve into the living heart of the world as a Resonance Warden. Emit rhythmic seismic pulses to stabilize ancient crystal formations, nurture vital energy conduits, and calm encroaching tectonic shifts before the core sh
tagline: Master the rhythm, save the core.

title: Myco Bloom
description: Guide the nimble Spore Guide through sprawling subterranean caverns. Use your mystic tether to draw in vital nutrients, cultivate blooming fungi, and redirect invasive Shadow Molds before they consume the ancient fungal
tagline: Cultivate the caverns, one spore at a time!

title: Cloudburst Comet
description: Guide the nimble Cloud Comet through the ethereal Sky Trails, dashing past swirling updrafts and dodging mischievous Storm Sprites. Collect glistening Dew Drops to fuel your celestial journey and outpace the encroaching
tagline: Ride the winds, master the skies!

title: Coral Chorus
description: Dive into a vibrant undersea world as the Lumina Jelly. Emit rhythmic sonic pulses to nurture blooming corals, awaken hidden life, and soothe agitated sea creatures, pushing back against the encroaching murk.
tagline: The ocean's rhythm awaits your touch!

title: Lumina Link
description: Guide the Lumina Bloom through enchanting twilight groves. Use your radiant tether to draw in drifting Sun Droplets, awaken slumbering ancient spirits, and gently redirect the mischievous Gloom Wisps before they dim the

title: Stardust Surge
description: Pilot a nimble Star-Sprite through treacherous cosmic lanes. Dash past swirling nebulae, dodge rogue asteroids, and collect shimmering Stellar Shards to fuel your momentum and outrun the encroaching Dark Matter.

title: Clockwork Echo
description: Stabilize a city inside a giant clock, gather time sparks, calm runaway mechanisms, and face the final midnight resonance.
